system.description: This style continues to be popular in Scotland, despite the lighter blades favored in England. This style teaches the student to wield a claymore (greatsword). The student is taught to whirl their blade at great speed to “make great room” around themselves with their blade.

finalSecret.description: You've become so hardened by training you can withstand greater punishment than most men. Whenever you are damaged by an attack, you may spend a Fortune Point to reduce the damage by 3 (instead of the usual 2).
finalSecret.name: Unstoppable Tenacity

benefit.name: Faster Than I Look
benefit.description: While armed with a claymore, you do not have the usual -1 penalty to Parry.
